title: Lesson 81: (Grammar) - at; in; when; by; with; and then; so; and; then; l...

intro_cards.title: Particle で: Location & Means
intro_cards.body:
で marks where an action happens, or the means used.

1. Where an action takes place:
• 図書館で勉強します。(I study at the library.)
• 公園で遊びます。(I play in the park.)

2. Means or instrument:
• バスで行きます。(I go by bus.)
• 箸で食べます。(I eat with chopsticks.)
• 日本語で話します。(I speak in Japanese.)

で vs に for location:
• 公園に犬がいる — the dog IS there (static existence)
• 公園で遊ぶ — playing HAPPENS there (action)
